chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 623 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 21 & 26. 2. For Order on CMA No. 3521/2022 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 None present. This reference application is pending since 2022 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Applicant remains unrepresented today without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
